title: A dining experience that brings families together.
subtitle: From our vibrant décor to our carefully crafted menu, every detail is designed to make your visit memorable.

items.title: Multi-Cuisine Menu
items.description: From spicy Chettinad Chicken to classic Paneer Butter Masala, our diverse menu caters to every palate.

items.title: Party Hall Available
items.description: A separate party room for kitty parties, birthday celebrations, and family gatherings of all sizes.

items.title: Inviting Ambience
items.description: Attractive décor, comfortable furniture, and Instagram-worthy interiors that elevate your dining experience.

items.title: Vegetarian Friendly
items.description: An extensive vegetarian menu featuring fresh ingredients and balanced flavors for every taste preference.
